title: Finding
description: One discrete weakness observed in a run. Stored append-only in workspace/<campaign>/memory/long_term_findings.jsonl. Field shapes mirror the validated SYSTEM_POLISH_FINDINGS.md model: severity x prevalence x improvement_leverage drives ranking; fidelity + verify_status keep predictions honest.

ts.description: ISO-8601 capture time (supplied by harness, never invented).

issue_class.description: Root-cause family; also the cluster join key.

cluster_hint.description: Free-text hint the Root-Cause Analyst uses to group; e.g. 'stall.dead-source-retry'.

severity.description: Production impact if this occurred: 1 trivial - 5 critical.

prevalence_est.description: Estimated fraction of in-scope scenarios that would trigger it.

improvement_leverage.description: Expected payoff of fixing it well (breadth x tractability).

fidelity.description: Highest fidelity at which this finding was observed.

verify_status.description: Result of the adversarial-verify pass. Default-to-skeptical: CONFIRMED only if a verifier could independently reproduce it, and never at L0 — a prediction's evidence is itself predicted, so verify at L0 caps at UNCERTAIN until execution (L1+) supplies checkable evidence. The orchestrating harness (or reference runner) enforces this clamp mechanically.

prompt_only_fix_plausible.description: Can a prompt/policy edit fix it, or is a tool/system change required?

evidence_ref.description: Path to the trace/log substantiating this finding.
